Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltfs' Further Responses To Special Interrogatories Set One; Request For Production, Set One;
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Carolyn A. Gyermek, Esq., appeared for Defendant & moving party: George Kohn

No other appearance. Tentative Ruling adopted. Defendant George Kohn's Motion To Compel Plaintiff's Further Responses To Special Interrogatories, Set One; Request For Production, Set One, is granted in part and denied in part. As to Interrogatory Nos. 13 and 14, Plaintiff is ordered to identify any person who has criticized the care provided and their statements, with the exception of any expert consulted in anticipation of litigation. As to Document Request No. 24, Plaintiff is ordered to produce redacted documents reflecting telephone calls to or from defendant. If the responsive documents are telephone bills or any other type of document, the only relevant information subject to production are the entries reflecting those calls. Further responses and production shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order. Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
